thread.title_full: Home at last: New Fulton City Hall opens for business | News | djournal.com

author: BEN SUTTON Itawamba County Times
title: Home at last: New Fulton City Hall opens for business | News | djournal.com
text:
After months of work on the building at 101 W. Wiygul Street, Fulton's seat of government has finally moved into its new home.
The newly completed Fulton City Hall opened its doors for business on Monday. The old City Hall closed on Friday as part of the moving process, with the majority of the moving completed over the weekend.
